   764→def normalize_timestamp(value: Any, fallback: str | None = None) -> str:
   765→    if isinstance(value, (int, float)):
   766→        return (
   767→            datetime.fromtimestamp(float(value), tz=timezone.utc)
   768→            .replace(microsecond=0)
   769→            .isoformat()
   770→            .replace("+00:00", "Z")
   771→        )
   772→    if isinstance(value, datetime):
   773→        normalized = value.astimezone(timezone.utc) if value.tzinfo else value
   774→        return normalized.replace(microsecond=0).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
   775→    if isinstance(value, str):
   776→        text = value.strip()
   777→        if not text:
   778→            return fallback or normalize_timestamp(datetime.now(timezone.utc))
   779→        iso_candidate = text[:-1] + "+00:00" if text.endswith("Z") else text
   780→        try:
   781→            parsed = datetime.fromisoformat(iso_candidate)
   782→            if parsed.tzinfo is not None:
   783→                parsed = parsed.astimezone(timezone.utc)
   784→            return parsed.replace(microsecond=0).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
   785→        except ValueError:
   786→            return text
   787→    return fallback or normalize_timestamp(datetime.now(timezone.utc))
   788→
   789→
   790→def earliest_timestamp(current: str, candidate: Any) -> str:
   791→    normalized = normalize_timestamp(candidate, current)
   792→    current_dt = parse_iso_timestamp(current)
   793→    normalized_dt = parse_iso_timestamp(normalized)
   794→    if current_dt is not None and normalized_dt is not None:
   795→        return normalized if normalized_dt < current_dt else current
   796→    if normalized_dt is not None:
   797→        return normalized
   798→    return current or normalized
   799→
   800→
   801→def parse_iso_timestamp(value: str) -> datetime | None:
   802→    if not value:
   803→        return None
   804→    candidate = value[:-1] + "+00:00" if value.endswith("Z") else value
   805→    try:
   806→        parsed = datetime.fromisoformat(candidate)
   807→    except ValueError:
   808→        return None
   809→    if parsed.tzinfo is None:
   810→        return parsed.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
   811→    return parsed.astimezone(timezone.utc)
   812→
   813→
   814→def timestamp_partition(timestamp: str) -> tuple[str, str]:
   815→    try:
   816→        candidate = timestamp[:-1] + "+00:00" if timestamp.endswith("Z") else timestamp
   817→        parsed = datetime.fromisoformat(candidate)
   818→        return parsed.strftime("%Y"), parsed.strftime("%m")
   819→    except ValueError:
   820→        return "unknown", "unknown"
   821→
   822→
   823→def join_paragraphs(parts: Any) -> str:
   824→    cleaned = [str(part).strip() for part in parts if str(part).strip()]
   825→    return "\n\n".join(cleaned)
   826→
   827→
   828→def summarize_value(value: Any, limit: int = 180) -> str:
   829→    if value is None:
   830→        return "none"
   831→    if isinstance(value, str):
   832→        text = " ".join(value.split())
   833→        return truncate(text, limit)
   834→    try:
   835→        text = json.dumps(value, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True)
   836→    except TypeError:
   837→        text = str(value)
   838→    text = " ".join(text.split())
   839→    return truncate(text, limit)
   840→
   841→
   842→def truncate(text: str, limit: int) -> str:
   843→    return text if len(text) <= limit else text[: limit - 3] + "..."
   844→
   845→
   846→def yaml_escape(value: str) -> str:
   847→    escaped = value.replace("\\", "\\\\").replace('"', '\\"').replace("\n", "\\n")
   848→    return f'"{escaped}"'
   849→
   850→
   851→def discover_source_files(clients: set[str] | None = None) -> list[tuple[str, Path]]:
   852→    requested = clients or CLIENTS
   853→    roots = default_client_roots()
   854→    patterns = {
   855→        "codex": ["sessions/**/*.jsonl"],
   856→        "claude": ["projects/**/*.jsonl"],
   857→        "gemini": [
   858→            "tmp/*/checkpoints/**/*.json",
   859→            "tmp/*/checkpoints/**/*.jsonl",
   860→            "history/**/*.json",
   861→            "history/**/*.jsonl",
   862→            "chats/**/*.json",
   863→            "chats/**/*.jsonl",
   864→        ],
   865→    }
   866→    matches: list[tuple[str, Path]] = []
   867→    seen: set[str] = set()
   868→    for client in sorted(requested):
   869→        root = roots.get(client)
   870→        if root is None or not root.exists():
   871→            continue
   872→        for pattern in patterns[client]:
   873→            for path in root.glob(pattern):
   874→                if not path.is_file():
   875→                    continue
   876→                key = path.resolve().as_posix().lower()
   877→                if key in seen:
   878→                    continue
   879→                seen.add(key)
   880→                matches.append((client, path.resolve()))
   881→    matches.sort(
   882→        key=lambda item: (safe_file_mtime(item[1]), item[1].as_posix().lower()),
   883→        reverse=True,
   884→    )
   885→    return matches
   886→
   887→
   888→def infer_project_slug(parsed: ParsedTranscript) -> str:
   889→    if parsed.cwd:
   890→        try:
   891→            cwd_path = Path(parsed.cwd)
   892→            return slugify(cwd_path.name, fallback="project")
   893→        except OSError:
   894→            pass
   895→    if parsed.client == "claude":
   896→        parent_name = parsed.source_path.parent.name
   897→        parent_name = re.sub(r"^[a-z]--", "", parent_name.lower())
   898→        return slugify(parent_name, fallback="project")
   899→    if parsed.client == "gemini" and parsed.source_path.parent.name:
   900→        return slugify(parsed.source_path.parent.name, fallback="project")
   901→    return "unknown-project"
   902→
   903→
   904→def transcript_matches_repo(parsed: ParsedTranscript, repo_root: Path, repo_slug: str) -> bool:
   905→    repo_root = repo_root.resolve()
   906→    if parsed.cwd:
   907→        try:
   908→            cwd_path = Path(parsed.cwd).resolve()
   909→            if cwd_path == repo_root:
   910→                return True
   911→            if repo_root in cwd_path.parents:
   912→                return True
   913→        except OSError:
   914→            pass
   915→    return project_slugs_match(infer_project_slug(parsed), repo_slug)
   916→
   917→
   918→def project_slugs_match(left: str, right: str) -> bool:
   919→    return bool(left and right and left == right and left != "unknown-project")
   920→
   921→
   922→def safe_file_mtime(path: Path) -> float:
   923→    try:
   924→        return path.stat().st_mtime
   925→    except OSError:
   926→        return 0.0
   927→

1→from __future__ import annotations
     2→
     3→import hashlib
     4→import json
     5→import re
     6→import shutil
     7→import sqlite3
     8→from dataclasses import dataclass
     9→from datetime import datetime, timezone
    10→from pathlib import Path
    11→from typing import Any
    12→
    13→
    14→CLIENTS = {"codex", "claude", "gemini"}
    15→TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES = {"input_text", "output_text", "text"}
    16→SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES = {"thinking", "reasoning"}
    17→TOOL_USE_TYPES = {"tool_use"}
    18→TOOL_RESULT_TYPES = {"tool_result"}
    19→
    20→
    21→@dataclass
    22→class TranscriptMessage:
    23→    role: str
    24→    text: str
    25→    timestamp: str | None = None
    26→
    27→
    28→@dataclass
    29→class TranscriptToolEvent:
    30→    summary: str
    31→    timestamp: str | None = None
    32→
    33→
    34→@dataclass
    35→class ParsedTranscript:
    36→    client: str
    37→    session_id: str
    38→    title: str
    39→    started_at: str
    40→    cwd: str
    41→    branch: str
    42→    messages: list[TranscriptMessage]
    43→    tool_events: list[TranscriptToolEvent]
    44→    source_path: Path
    45→
    46→
    47→def default_global_transcript_root() -> Path:
    48→    return Path.home() / ".memorytree" / "transcripts"
    49→
    50→
    51→def default_client_roots() -> dict[str, Path]:
    52→    home = Path.home()
    53→    return {
    54→        "codex": home / ".codex",
    55→        "claude": home / ".claude",
    56→        "gemini": home / ".gemini",
    57→    }
    58→
    59→
    60→def slugify(value: str, fallback: str = "session") -> str:
    61→    ascii_value = value.encode("ascii", "ignore").decode("ascii").lower()
    62→    slug = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9._-]+", "-", ascii_value).strip("-._")
    63→    return slug or fallback
    64→
    65→
    66→def sha256_file(path: Path) -> str:
    67→    digest = hashlib.sha256()
    68→    with path.open("rb") as handle:
    69→        for chunk in iter(lambda: handle.read(1024 * 1024), b""):
    70→            digest.update(chunk)
    71→    return digest.hexdigest()
    72→
    73→
    74→def infer_client(client: str, source: Path) -> str:
    75→    if client != "auto":
    76→        return client
    77→    normalized = source.as_posix().lower()
    78→    if "/.codex/" in normalized or "rollout-" in source.name.lower():
    79→        return "codex"
    80→    if "/.claude/" in normalized or "/projects/" in normalized:
    81→        return "claude"
    82→    if "/.gemini/" in normalized or "checkpoint" in normalized:
    83→        return "gemini"
    84→    raise SystemExit(f"could not infer transcript client from source path: {source}")
    85→
    86→
    87→def parse_transcript(client: str, source: Path) -> ParsedTranscript:
    88→    if client == "codex":
    89→        return parse_codex_transcript(source)
    90→    if client == "claude":
    91→        return parse_claude_transcript(source)
    92→    if client == "gemini":
    93→        return parse_gemini_transcript(source)
    94→    raise SystemExit(f"unsupported transcript client: {client}")
    95→
    96→
    97→def parse_codex_transcript(path: Path) -> ParsedTranscript:
    98→    records = load_jsonl(path)
    99→    session_id = path.stem
   100→    title = path.stem
   101→    started_at = normalize_timestamp(path.stat().st_mtime)
   102→    cwd = ""
   103→    branch = ""
   104→    messages: list[TranscriptMessage] = []
   105→    tool_events: list[TranscriptToolEvent] = []
   106→
   107→    for record in records:
   108→        record_type = str(record.get("type") or "")
   109→        timestamp = normalize_timestamp(record.get("timestamp"), started_at)
   110→        if record_type == "session_meta":
   111→            payload = ensure_dict(record.get("payload"))
   112→            session_id = str(payload.get("id") or session_id)
   113→            title = str(payload.get("thread_name") or payload.get("title") or title)
   114→            started_at = earliest_timestamp(started_at, payload.get("timestamp"))
   115→            cwd = str(payload.get("cwd") or cwd)
   116→            branch = str(get_nested(payload, "git", "branch") or branch)
   117→            continue
   118→
   119→        if record_type not in {"response_item", "event_msg"}:
   120→            continue
   121→
   122→        payload = ensure_dict(record.get("payload"))
   123→        payload_type = str(payload.get("type") or "")
   124→        if payload_type == "message":
   125→            role = str(payload.get("role") or "").lower()
   126→            if role in {"user", "assistant"}:
   127→                text = extract_text_blocks(payload.get("content"))
   128→                if text:
   129→                    messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))
   130→            continue
   131→
   132→        if payload_type in {"user_message", "agent_message"}:
   133→            role = "user" if payload_type == "user_message" else "assistant"
   134→            text = str(payload.get("message") or "").strip()
   135→            if text:
   136→                messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))
   137→            continue
   138→
   139→        if payload_type == "function_call":
   140→            name = str(payload.get("name") or "function_call")
   141→            arguments = payload.get("arguments") or payload.get("input")
   142→            tool_events.append(
   143→                TranscriptToolEvent(
   144→                    summary=f"{name} input={summarize_value(arguments)}",
   145→                    timestamp=timestamp,
   146→                )
   147→            )
   148→            continue
   149→
   150→        if payload_type == "custom_tool_call":
   151→            name = str(payload.get("name") or payload.get("call_id") or "custom_tool_call")
   152→            tool_events.append(
   153→                TranscriptToolEvent(
   154→                    summary=f"{name} input={summarize_value(payload.get('input'))}",
   155→                    timestamp=timestamp,
   156→                )
   157→            )
   158→            continue
   159→
   160→        if payload_type == "function_call_output":
   161→            name = str(payload.get("name") or payload.get("call_id") or "function_call_output")
   162→            output = payload.get("output") or payload.get("content")
   163→            tool_events.append(
   164→                TranscriptToolEvent(
   165→                    summary=f"{name} output={summarize_value(output)}",
   166→                    timestamp=timestamp,
   167→                )
   168→            )
   169→            continue
   170→
   171→        if payload_type == "custom_tool_call_output":
   172→            name = str(payload.get("name") or payload.get("call_id") or "custom_tool_call_output")
   173→            output = payload.get("output") or payload.get("content")
   174→            tool_events.append(
   175→                TranscriptToolEvent(
   176→                    summary=f"{name} output={summarize_value(output)}",
   177→                    timestamp=timestamp,
   178→                )
   179→            )
   180→
   181→    return ParsedTranscript(
   182→        client="codex",
   183→        session_id=session_id,
   184→        title=title,
   185→        started_at=started_at,
   186→        cwd=cwd,
   187→        branch=branch,
   188→        messages=messages,
   189→        tool_events=tool_events,
   190→        source_path=path,
   191→    )

   193→
   194→def parse_claude_transcript(path: Path) -> ParsedTranscript:
   195→    records = load_jsonl(path)
   196→    session_id = path.stem
   197→    title = path.stem
   198→    started_at = normalize_timestamp(path.stat().st_mtime)
   199→    cwd = ""
   200→    branch = ""
   201→    messages: list[TranscriptMessage] = []
   202→    tool_events: list[TranscriptToolEvent] = []
   203→
   204→    for record in records:
   205→        record_type = str(record.get("type") or "")
   206→        timestamp = normalize_timestamp(record.get("timestamp"), started_at)
   207→        session_id = str(record.get("sessionId") or session_id)
   208→        started_at = earliest_timestamp(started_at, record.get("timestamp"))
   209→        cwd = str(record.get("cwd") or cwd)
   210→        branch = str(record.get("gitBranch") or branch)
   211→
   212→        if record_type not in {"user", "assistant"}:
   213→            continue
   214→
   215→        message = ensure_dict(record.get("message"))
   216→        role = str(message.get("role") or record_type).lower()
   217→        text_parts: list[str] = []
   218→        content = message.get("content")
   219→        if isinstance(content, str):
   220→            text = content.strip()
   221→            if role in {"user", "assistant"} and text:
   222→                messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))
   223→            continue
   224→
   225→        for block in ensure_list(content):
   226→            if isinstance(block, str):
   227→                if block.strip():
   228→                    text_parts.append(block.strip())
   229→                continue
   230→            if not isinstance(block, dict):
   231→                continue
   232→            block_type = str(block.get("type") or "").lower()
   233→            if block_type in TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES:
   234→                text = str(block.get("text") or "").strip()
   235→                if text:
   236→                    text_parts.append(text)
   237→                continue
   238→            if block_type in SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES:
   239→                continue
   240→            if block_type in TOOL_USE_TYPES:
   241→                name = str(block.get("name") or "tool_use")
   242→                tool_events.append(
   243→                    TranscriptToolEvent(
   244→                        summary=f"{name} input={summarize_value(block.get('input'))}",
   245→                        timestamp=timestamp,
   246→                    )
   247→                )
   248→                continue
   249→            if block_type in TOOL_RESULT_TYPES:
   250→                tool_use_id = str(block.get("tool_use_id") or "tool_result")
   251→                tool_events.append(
   252→                    TranscriptToolEvent(
   253→                        summary=f"{tool_use_id} output={summarize_value(block.get('content'))}",
   254→                        timestamp=timestamp,
   255→                    )
   256→                )
   257→
   258→        text = join_paragraphs(text_parts)
   259→        if role in {"user", "assistant"} and text:
   260→            messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))
   261→
   262→    return ParsedTranscript(
   263→        client="claude",
   264→        session_id=session_id,
   265→        title=title,
   266→        started_at=started_at,
   267→        cwd=cwd,
   268→        branch=branch,
   269→        messages=messages,
   270→        tool_events=tool_events,
   271→        source_path=path,
   272→    )
   273→
   274→
   275→def parse_gemini_transcript(path: Path) -> ParsedTranscript:
   276→    session_id = path.stem
   277→    title = path.stem
   278→    started_at = normalize_timestamp(path.stat().st_mtime)
   279→    cwd = ""
   280→    branch = ""
   281→    messages: list[TranscriptMessage] = []
   282→    tool_events: list[TranscriptToolEvent] = []
   283→
   284→    if path.suffix.lower() == ".jsonl":
   285→        payload: Any = load_jsonl(path)
   286→    else:
   287→        payload = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   288→
   289→    message_signatures: set[tuple[str, str, str | None]] = set()
   290→    first_meta = find_first_mapping_with_keys(payload, {"sessionId", "chatId", "cwd", "branch", "timestamp"})
   291→    if first_meta:
   292→        session_id = str(first_meta.get("sessionId") or first_meta.get("chatId") or first_meta.get("id") or session_id)
   293→        started_at = earliest_timestamp(started_at, first_meta.get("timestamp"))
   294→        cwd = str(first_meta.get("cwd") or first_meta.get("projectRoot") or cwd)
   295→        branch = str(first_meta.get("branch") or branch)
   296→
   297→    def visit(node: Any) -> None:
   298→        nonlocal session_id, started_at, cwd, branch
   299→        if isinstance(node, list):
   300→            for item in node:
   301→                visit(item)
   302→            return
   303→        if not isinstance(node, dict):
   304→            return
   305→
   306→        session_id = str(node.get("sessionId") or node.get("chatId") or node.get("id") or session_id)
   307→        started_at = earliest_timestamp(started_at, node.get("timestamp"))
   308→        cwd = str(node.get("cwd") or node.get("projectRoot") or cwd)
   309→        branch = str(node.get("branch") or branch)
   310→
   311→        role = str(node.get("role") or node.get("author") or node.get("sender") or "").lower()
   312→        timestamp = normalize_timestamp(node.get("timestamp"), started_at)
   313→        if role in {"user", "assistant", "model"}:
   314→            normalized_role = "assistant" if role == "model" else role
   315→            text = extract_gemini_text(node)
   316→            signature = (normalized_role, text, timestamp)
   317→            if text and signature not in message_signatures:
   318→                message_signatures.add(signature)
   319→                messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=normalized_role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))
   320→
   321→        tool_name = (
   322→            get_nested(node, "toolUse", "name")
   323→            or node.get("toolName")
   324→            or node.get("functionName")
   325→            or node.get("tool")
   326→        )
   327→        if tool_name:
   328→            tool_events.append(
   329→                TranscriptToolEvent(
   330→                    summary=f"{tool_name} input={summarize_value(node.get('args') or node.get('input'))}",
   331→                    timestamp=timestamp,
   332→                )
   333→            )
   334→
   335→        for value in node.values():
   336→            visit(value)
   337→
   338→    visit(payload)
   339→
   340→    return ParsedTranscript(
   341→        client="gemini",
   342→        session_id=session_id,
   343→        title=title,
   344→        started_at=started_at,
   345→        cwd=cwd,
   346→        branch=branch,
   347→        messages=messages,
   348→        tool_events=tool_events,
   349→        source_path=path,
   350→    )
   351→
   352→
   353→def import_transcript(
   354→    parsed: ParsedTranscript,
   355→    root: Path,
   356→    global_root: Path,
   357→    project_slug: str,
   358→    raw_upload_permission: str,
   359→    mirror_to_repo: bool = True,
   360→) -> dict[str, Any]:
   361→    imported_at = normalize_timestamp(datetime.now(timezone.utc))
   362→    raw_sha256 = sha256_file(parsed.source_path)
   363→    session_label = slugify(parsed.session_id, fallback=slugify(parsed.source_path.stem, fallback="session"))
   364→    artifact_stem = f"{session_label}__{raw_sha256[:8]}"
   365→    source_suffix = parsed.source_path.suffix or ".txt"
   366→
   367→    year_token, month_token = timestamp_partition(parsed.started_at or imported_at)
   368→
   369→    repo_root = root / "Memory" / "06_transcripts"
   370→    repo_raw_path = repo_root / "raw" / parsed.client / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}{source_suffix}"
   371→    repo_clean_path = repo_root / "clean" / parsed.client / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}.md"
   372→    repo_manifest_path = repo_root / "manifests" / parsed.client / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}.json"
   373→
   374→    global_raw_path = global_root / "raw" / parsed.client / project_slug / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}{source_suffix}"
   375→    global_clean_path = global_root / "clean" / parsed.client / project_slug / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}.md"
   376→    global_manifest_path = global_root / "index" / "manifests" / parsed.client / project_slug / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}.json"
   377→    global_event_log_path = global_root / "index" / "sessions.jsonl"
   378→    global_db_path = global_root / "index" / "search.sqlite"
   379→
   380→    for path in (
   381→        global_raw_path,
   382→        global_clean_path,
   383→        global_manifest_path,
   384→        global_event_log_path,
   385→        global_db_path,
   386→    ):
   387→        path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   388→    if mirror_to_repo:
   389→        for path in (repo_raw_path, repo_clean_path, repo_manifest_path):
   390→            path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   391→
   392→    if mirror_to_repo:
   393→        copy_file(parsed.source_path, repo_raw_path)
   394→    copy_file(parsed.source_path, global_raw_path)
   395→
   396→    manifest = {
   397→        "client": parsed.client,
   398→        "project": project_slug,
   399→        "session_id": parsed.session_id,
   400→        "title": parsed.title,
   401→        "started_at": parsed.started_at,
   402→        "imported_at": imported_at,
   403→        "cwd": parsed.cwd,
   404→        "branch": parsed.branch,
   405→        "raw_source_path": parsed.source_path.as_posix(),
   406→        "raw_sha256": raw_sha256,
   407→        "raw_upload_permission": raw_upload_permission,
   408→        "repo_raw_path": repo_raw_path.relative_to(root).as_posix() if mirror_to_repo else "",
   409→        "repo_clean_path": repo_clean_path.relative_to(root).as_posix() if mirror_to_repo else "",
   410→        "repo_manifest_path": repo_manifest_path.relative_to(root).as_posix() if mirror_to_repo else "",
   411→        "global_raw_path": global_raw_path.as_posix(),
   412→        "global_clean_path": global_clean_path.as_posix(),
   413→        "global_manifest_path": global_manifest_path.as_posix(),
   414→        "message_count": len(parsed.messages),
   415→        "tool_event_count": len(parsed.tool_events),
   416→        "cleaning_mode": "deterministic-code",
   417→        "repo_mirror_enabled": mirror_to_repo,
   418→    }
   419→    existing_global_manifest = load_json(global_manifest_path)
   420→    manifest = preserve_existing_import_timestamp(existing_global_manifest, manifest)
   421→
   422→    if mirror_to_repo:
   423→        write_clean_markdown(parsed, manifest, repo_clean_path)
   424→    write_clean_markdown(parsed, manifest, global_clean_path)
   425→    if mirror_to_repo:
   426→        write_json(repo_manifest_path, manifest)
   427→    append_to_event_log = existing_global_manifest is None or existing_global_manifest != manifest
   428→    write_json(global_manifest_path, manifest)
   429→    if append_to_event_log:
   430→        append_jsonl(global_event_log_path, manifest)
   431→    upsert_search_index(global_db_path, manifest)
   432→
   433→    result = dict(manifest)
   434→    result["global_index_db"] = global_db_path.as_posix()
   435→    return result
   436→

   438→def write_clean_markdown(parsed: ParsedTranscript, manifest: dict[str, Any], path: Path) -> None:
   439→    lines = [
   440→        "---",
   441→        f"client: {manifest['client']}",
   442→        f"project: {manifest['project']}",
   443→        f"session_id: {manifest['session_id']}",
   444→        f"title: {yaml_escape(manifest['title'])}",
   445→        f"started_at: {manifest['started_at']}",
   446→        f"imported_at: {manifest['imported_at']}",
   447→        f"cwd: {yaml_escape(manifest['cwd'])}",
   448→        f"branch: {yaml_escape(manifest['branch'])}",
   449→        f"raw_source_path: {yaml_escape(manifest['raw_source_path'])}",
   450→        f"raw_sha256: {manifest['raw_sha256']}",
   451→        f"raw_upload_permission: {manifest['raw_upload_permission']}",
   452→        f"cleaning_mode: {manifest['cleaning_mode']}",
   453→        "---",
   454→        "",
   455→        f"# {manifest['title'] or manifest['session_id']}",
   456→        "",
   457→        "## Metadata",
   458→        f"- Client: `{manifest['client']}`",
   459→        f"- Project: `{manifest['project']}`",
   460→        f"- Session ID: `{manifest['session_id']}`",
   461→        f"- Started At: `{manifest['started_at']}`",
   462→        f"- Imported At: `{manifest['imported_at']}`",
   463→        f"- Raw SHA256: `{manifest['raw_sha256']}`",
   464→        f"- Raw Source: `{manifest['raw_source_path']}`",
   465→        f"- Repo Raw Path: `{manifest['repo_raw_path']}`",
   466→        f"- Repo Clean Path: `{manifest['repo_clean_path']}`",
   467→        "",
   468→        "## Messages",
   469→    ]
   470→
   471→    if parsed.messages:
   472→        for index, message in enumerate(parsed.messages, start=1):
   473→            lines.extend(
   474→                [
   475→                    f"### {index}. {message.role}",
   476→                    f"- Timestamp: `{message.timestamp or manifest['started_at']}`",
   477→                    "",
   478→                    message.text,
   479→                    "",
   480→                ]
   481→            )
   482→    else:
   483→        lines.extend(
   484→            [
   485→                "No user or assistant messages were extracted deterministically from the source transcript.",
   486→                "",
   487→            ]
   488→        )
   489→
   490→    lines.append("## Tool Events")
   491→    if parsed.tool_events:
   492→        for event in parsed.tool_events:
   493→            lines.append(f"- `{event.timestamp or manifest['started_at']}` {event.summary}")
   494→    else:
   495→        lines.append("- No tool events were extracted.")
   496→    lines.append("")
   497→
   498→    path.write_text("\n".join(lines), encoding="utf-8")
   499→

   501→def upsert_search_index(db_path: Path, manifest: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
   502→    conn = sqlite3.connect(db_path)
   503→    try:
   504→        conn.execute("PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL")
   505→        conn.execute(
   506→            """
   507→            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS transcripts (
   508→                client TEXT NOT NULL,
   509→                project TEXT NOT NULL,
   510→                session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
   511→                raw_sha256 TEXT NOT NULL,
   512→                title TEXT NOT NULL,
   513→                started_at TEXT NOT NULL,
   514→                imported_at TEXT NOT NULL,
   515→                cwd TEXT NOT NULL,
   516→                branch TEXT NOT NULL,
   517→                raw_source_path TEXT NOT NULL,
   518→                raw_upload_permission TEXT NOT NULL,
   519→                global_raw_path TEXT NOT NULL,
   520→                global_clean_path TEXT NOT NULL,
   521→                repo_raw_path TEXT NOT NULL,
   522→                repo_clean_path TEXT NOT NULL,
   523→                repo_manifest_path TEXT NOT NULL,
   524→                message_count INTEGER NOT NULL,
   525→                tool_event_count INTEGER NOT NULL,
   526→                PRIMARY KEY (client, project, session_id, raw_sha256)
   527→            )
   528→            """
   529→        )
   530→        conn.execute(
   531→            """
   532→            INSERT INTO transcripts (
   533→                client,
   534→                project,
   535→                session_id,
   536→                raw_sha256,
   537→                title,
   538→                started_at,
   539→                imported_at,
   540→                cwd,
   541→                branch,
   542→                raw_source_path,
   543→                raw_upload_permission,
   544→                global_raw_path,
   545→                global_clean_path,
   546→                repo_raw_path,
   547→                repo_clean_path,
   548→                repo_manifest_path,
   549→                message_count,
   550→                tool_event_count
   551→            ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
   552→            ON CONFLICT(client, project, session_id, raw_sha256) DO UPDATE SET
   553→                title = excluded.title,
   554→                started_at = excluded.started_at,
   555→                imported_at = excluded.imported_at,
   556→                cwd = excluded.cwd,
   557→                branch = excluded.branch,
   558→                raw_source_path = excluded.raw_source_path,
   559→                raw_upload_permission = excluded.raw_upload_permission,
   560→                global_raw_path = excluded.global_raw_path,
   561→                global_clean_path = excluded.global_clean_path,
   562→                repo_raw_path = excluded.repo_raw_path,
   563→                repo_clean_path = excluded.repo_clean_path,
   564→                repo_manifest_path = excluded.repo_manifest_path,
   565→                message_count = excluded.message_count,
   566→                tool_event_count = excluded.tool_event_count
   567→            """,
   568→            (
   569→                manifest["client"],
   570→                manifest["project"],
   571→                manifest["session_id"],
   572→                manifest["raw_sha256"],
   573→                manifest["title"],
   574→                manifest["started_at"],
   575→                manifest["imported_at"],
   576→                manifest["cwd"],
   577→                manifest["branch"],
   578→                manifest["raw_source_path"],
   579→                manifest["raw_upload_permission"],
   580→                manifest["global_raw_path"],
   581→                manifest["global_clean_path"],
   582→                manifest["repo_raw_path"],
   583→                manifest["repo_clean_path"],
   584→                manifest["repo_manifest_path"],
   585→                manifest["message_count"],
   586→                manifest["tool_event_count"],
   587→            ),
   588→        )
   589→        conn.commit()
   590→    finally:
   591→        conn.close()

   594→def copy_file(source: Path, destination: Path) -> None:
   595→    if source.resolve() == destination.resolve():
   596→        return
   597→    shutil.copy2(source, destination)

   599→
   600→def transcript_has_content(parsed: ParsedTranscript) -> bool:
   601→    return bool(parsed.messages or parsed.tool_events)

   603→
   604→def write_json(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
   605→    path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
   606→
   607→
   608→def manifest_changed(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
   609→    if not path.exists():
   610→        return True
   611→    try:
   612→        current = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   613→    except (OSError, json.JSONDecodeError):
   614→        return True
   615→    return current != payload
   616→
   617→
   618→def preserve_existing_import_timestamp(existing: dict[str, Any] | None, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
   619→    if existing is None:
   620→        return payload
   621→    if manifest_signature(existing) != manifest_signature(payload):
   622→        return payload
   623→    preserved = dict(payload)
   624→    imported_at = existing.get("imported_at")
   625→    if isinstance(imported_at, str) and imported_at:
   626→        preserved["imported_at"] = imported_at
   627→    return preserved
   628→
   629→
   630→def manifest_signature(payload: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
   631→    return {key: value for key, value in payload.items() if key != "imported_at"}
   632→
   633→
   634→def append_jsonl(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
   635→    with path.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
   636→        handle.write(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n")
   637→
   638→
   639→def load_jsonl(path: Path) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
   640→    records: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
   641→    with path.open("r", encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore") as handle:
   642→        for line in handle:
   643→            line = line.strip()
   644→            if not line:
   645→                continue
   646→            try:
   647→                records.append(json.loads(line))
   648→            except json.JSONDecodeError:
   649→                continue
   650→    return records
   651→
   652→
   653→def load_json(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
   654→    if not path.exists():
   655→        return None
   656→    try:
   657→        return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   658→    except (OSError, json.JSONDecodeError):
   659→        return None
   660→
   661→
   662→def ensure_dict(value: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
   663→    return value if isinstance(value, dict) else {}
   664→
   665→
   666→def ensure_list(value: Any) -> list[Any]:
   667→    return value if isinstance(value, list) else []
   668→
   669→
   670→def get_nested(payload: dict[str, Any], *keys: str) -> Any:
   671→    current: Any = payload
   672→    for key in keys:
   673→        if not isinstance(current, dict):
   674→            return None
   675→        current = current.get(key)
   676→    return current
   677→
   678→
   679→def extract_text_blocks(blocks: Any) -> str:
   680→    parts: list[str] = []
   681→    for block in ensure_list(blocks):
   682→        if isinstance(block, str):
   683→            text = block.strip()
   684→            if text:
   685→                parts.append(text)
   686→            continue
   687→        if not isinstance(block, dict):
   688→            continue
   689→        block_type = str(block.get("type") or "").lower()
   690→        if block_type in SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES | TOOL_USE_TYPES | TOOL_RESULT_TYPES:
   691→            continue
   692→        if block_type in TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES:
   693→            text = str(block.get("text") or "").strip()
   694→            if text:
   695→                parts.append(text)
   696→            continue
   697→        fallback_text = extract_simple_text(block)
   698→        if fallback_text:
   699→            parts.append(fallback_text)
   700→    return join_paragraphs(parts)
   701→
   702→
   703→def extract_simple_text(value: Any) -> str:
   704→    if isinstance(value, str):
   705→        return value.strip()
   706→    if isinstance(value, list):
   707→        return join_paragraphs(extract_simple_text(item) for item in value)
   708→    if isinstance(value, dict):
   709→        for key in ("text", "content", "value"):
   710→            if key in value and isinstance(value[key], str):
   711→                return value[key].strip()
   712→        return ""
   713→    return ""
   714→
   715→
   716→def extract_gemini_text(node: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
   717→    parts: list[str] = []
   718→    for candidate in (node.get("parts"), node.get("content"), node.get("text"), node.get("message")):
   719→        parts.extend(extract_gemini_parts(candidate))
   720→    return join_paragraphs(parts)
   721→
   722→
   723→def extract_gemini_parts(value: Any) -> list[str]:
   724→    if isinstance(value, str):
   725→        text = value.strip()
   726→        return [text] if text else []
   727→    if isinstance(value, list):
   728→        parts: list[str] = []
   729→        for item in value:
   730→            parts.extend(extract_gemini_parts(item))
   731→        return parts
   732→    if isinstance(value, dict):
   733→        block_type = str(value.get("type") or "").lower()
   734→        if block_type in SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES | TOOL_USE_TYPES | TOOL_RESULT_TYPES:
   735→            return []
   736→        if "text" in value and isinstance(value["text"], str):
   737→            text = value["text"].strip()
   738→            return [text] if text else []
   739→        parts: list[str] = []
   740→        for key in ("parts", "content"):
   741→            if key in value:
   742→                parts.extend(extract_gemini_parts(value[key]))
   743→        return parts
   744→    return []
   745→
   746→
   747→def find_first_mapping_with_keys(value: Any, keys: set[str]) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
   748→    if isinstance(value, dict):
   749→        if keys & set(value.keys()):
   750→            return value
   751→        for candidate in value.values():
   752→            result = find_first_mapping_with_keys(candidate, keys)
   753→            if result is not None:
   754→                return result
   755→        return None
   756→    if isinstance(value, list):
   757→        for candidate in value:
   758→            result = find_first_mapping_with_keys(candidate, keys)
   759→            if result is not None:
   760→                return result
   761→    return None
   762→
   763→
   764→def normalize_timestamp(value: Any, fallback: str | None = None) -> str:
   765→    if isinstance(value, (int, float)):
   766→        return (
   767→            datetime.fromtimestamp(float(value), tz=timezone.utc)
   768→            .replace(microsecond=0)
   769→            .isoformat()
   770→            .replace("+00:00", "Z")
   771→        )
   772→    if isinstance(value, datetime):
   773→        normalized = value.astimezone(timezone.utc) if value.tzinfo else value
   774→        return normalized.replace(microsecond=0).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
   775→    if isinstance(value, str):
   776→        text = value.strip()
   777→        if not text:
   778→            return fallback or normalize_timestamp(datetime.now(timezone.utc))
   779→        iso_candidate = text[:-1] + "+00:00" if text.endswith("Z") else text
   780→        try:
   781→            parsed = datetime.fromisoformat(iso_candidate)
   782→            if parsed.tzinfo is not None:
   783→                parsed = parsed.astimezone(timezone.utc)
   784→            return parsed.replace(microsecond=0).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
   785→        except ValueError:
   786→            return text
   787→    return fallback or normalize_timestamp(datetime.now(timezone.utc))
   788→
   789→
   790→def earliest_timestamp(current: str, candidate: Any) -> str:
   791→    normalized = normalize_timestamp(candidate, current)
   792→    current_dt = parse_iso_timestamp(current)
   793→    normalized_dt = parse_iso_timestamp(normalized)
   794→    if current_dt is not None and normalized_dt is not None:
   795→        return normalized if normalized_dt < current_dt else current
   796→    if normalized_dt is not None:
   797→        return normalized
   798→    return current or normalized
   799→
   800→
   801→def parse_iso_timestamp(value: str) -> datetime | None:
   802→    if not value:
   803→        return None
   804→    candidate = value[:-1] + "+00:00" if value.endswith("Z") else value
   805→    try:
   806→        parsed = datetime.fromisoformat(candidate)
   807→    except ValueError:
   808→        return None
   809→    if parsed.tzinfo is None:
   810→        return parsed.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
   811→    return parsed.astimezone(timezone.utc)
   812→
   813→
   814→def timestamp_partition(timestamp: str) -> tuple[str, str]:
   815→    try:
   816→        candidate = timestamp[:-1] + "+00:00" if timestamp.endswith("Z") else timestamp
   817→        parsed = datetime.fromisoformat(candidate)
   818→        return parsed.strftime("%Y"), parsed.strftime("%m")
   819→    except ValueError:
   820→        return "unknown", "unknown"
   821→
   822→
   823→def join_paragraphs(parts: Any) -> str:
   824→    cleaned = [str(part).strip() for part in parts if str(part).strip()]
   825→    return "\n\n".join(cleaned)
   826→
   827→
   828→def summarize_value(value: Any, limit: int = 180) -> str:
   829→    if value is None:
   830→        return "none"
   831→    if isinstance(value, str):
   832→        text = " ".join(value.split())
   833→        return truncate(text, limit)
   834→    try:
   835→        text = json.dumps(value, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True)
   836→    except TypeError:
   837→        text = str(value)
   838→    text = " ".join(text.split())
   839→    return truncate(text, limit)
   840→
   841→
   842→def truncate(text: str, limit: int) -> str:
   843→    return text if len(text) <= limit else text[: limit - 3] + "..."
   844→
   845→
   846→def yaml_escape(value: str) -> str:
   847→    escaped = value.replace("\\", "\\\\").replace('"', '\\"').replace("\n", "\\n")
   848→    return f'"{escaped}"'
   849→
   850→
   851→def discover_source_files(clients: set[str] | None = None) -> list[tuple[str, Path]]:
   852→    requested = clients or CLIENTS
   853→    roots = default_client_roots()
   854→    patterns = {
   855→        "codex": ["sessions/**/*.jsonl"],
   856→        "claude": ["projects/**/*.jsonl"],
   857→        "gemini": [
   858→            "tmp/*/checkpoints/**/*.json",
   859→            "tmp/*/checkpoints/**/*.jsonl",
   860→            "history/**/*.json",
   861→            "history/**/*.jsonl",
   862→            "chats/**/*.json",
   863→            "chats/**/*.jsonl",
   864→        ],
   865→    }
   866→    matches: list[tuple[str, Path]] = []
   867→    seen: set[str] = set()
   868→    for client in sorted(requested):
   869→        root = roots.get(client)
   870→        if root is None or not root.exists():
   871→            continue
   872→        for pattern in patterns[client]:
   873→            for path in root.glob(pattern):
   874→                if not path.is_file():
   875→                    continue
   876→                key = path.resolve().as_posix().lower()
   877→                if key in seen:
   878→                    continue
   879→                seen.add(key)
   880→                matches.append((client, path.resolve()))
   881→    matches.sort(
   882→        key=lambda item: (safe_file_mtime(item[1]), item[1].as_posix().lower()),
   883→        reverse=True,
   884→    )
   885→    return matches
   886→
   887→
   888→def infer_project_slug(parsed: ParsedTranscript) -> str:
   889→    if parsed.cwd:
   890→        try:
   891→            cwd_path = Path(parsed.cwd)
   892→            return slugify(cwd_path.name, fallback="project")
   893→        except OSError:
   894→            pass
   895→    if parsed.client == "claude":
   896→        parent_name = parsed.source_path.parent.name
   897→        parent_name = re.sub(r"^[a-z]--", "", parent_name.lower())
   898→        return slugify(parent_name, fallback="project")
   899→    if parsed.client == "gemini" and parsed.source_path.parent.name:
   900→        return slugify(parsed.source_path.parent.name, fallback="project")
   901→    return "unknown-project"
   902→
   903→
   904→def transcript_matches_repo(parsed: ParsedTranscript, repo_root: Path, repo_slug: str) -> bool:
   905→    repo_root = repo_root.resolve()
   906→    if parsed.cwd:
   907→        try:
   908→            cwd_path = Path(parsed.cwd).resolve()
   909→            if cwd_path == repo_root:
   910→                return True
   911→            if repo_root in cwd_path.parents:
   912→                return True
   913→        except OSError:
   914→            pass
   915→    return project_slugs_match(infer_project_slug(parsed), repo_slug)
   916→
   917→
   918→def project_slugs_match(left: str, right: str) -> bool:
   919→    return bool(left and right and left == right and left != "unknown-project")
   920→
   921→
   922→def safe_file_mtime(path: Path) -> float:
   923→    try:
   924→        return path.stat().st_mtime
   925→    except OSError:
   926→        return 0.0
   927→

1→#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2→"""
     3→Import one local AI transcript into MemoryTree using deterministic code-based
     4→cleaning. Current-project sources mirror into both the repo and the user-level
     5→global archive; unrelated sources archive globally only.
     6→"""
     7→
     8→from __future__ import annotations
     9→
    10→import argparse
    11→import json
    12→from pathlib import Path
    13→

    22→    transcript_has_content,
    23→    transcript_matches_repo,
    24→)
    25→
    26→
    27→def main() -> int:
    28→    args = parse_args()
    29→    root = Path(args.root).resolve()
    30→    source = Path(args.source).resolve()
    31→    if not root.exists():
    32→        raise SystemExit(f"root does not exist: {root}")
    33→    if not source.exists():
    34→        raise SystemExit(f"source transcript does not exist: {source}")
    35→
    36→    client = infer_client(args.client, source)
    37→    global_root = resolve_global_root(args.global_root)
    38→    repo_slug = slugify(args.project_name.strip() or root.name, fallback="project")
    39→
    40→    parsed = parse_transcript(client, source)
    41→    if not transcript_has_content(parsed):
    42→        raise SystemExit(f"source transcript does not contain any importable messages or tool events: {source}")
    43→    detected_project = infer_project_slug(parsed)
    44→    matches_current_repo = transcript_matches_repo(parsed, root, repo_slug)
    45→    result = import_transcript(
    46→        parsed=parsed,
    47→        root=root,
    48→        global_root=global_root,
    49→        project_slug=repo_slug if matches_current_repo else detected_project,
    50→        raw_upload_permission=args.raw_upload_permission if matches_current_repo else "not-applicable",
    51→        mirror_to_repo=matches_current_repo,
    52→    )
    53→    result["matches_current_repo"] = matches_current_repo
    54→    result["detected_project"] = detected_project
    55→
    56→    if args.format == "json":
    57→        print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False))
    58→    else:
    59→        print(format_result_text(result))
    60→    return 0
    61→
    62→
    63→def parse_args() -> argparse.Namespace:
    64→    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Import one local transcript into MemoryTree archives.")
    65→    parser.add_argument("--root", default=".", help="Target repository root.")
    66→    parser.add_argument("--source", required=True, help="Raw transcript source file path.")
    67→    parser.add_argument(
    68→        "--client",
    69→        choices=("auto", *sorted(CLIENTS)),
    70→        default="auto",
    71→        help="Transcript client family.",
    72→    )
    73→    parser.add_argument(
    74→        "--project-name",
    75→        default="",
    76→        help="Project label used for the global transcript archive. Defaults to the repo folder name.",
    77→    )
    78→    parser.add_argument(
    79→        "--global-root",
    80→        default="",
    81→        help="Override the user-level global transcript root. Defaults to ~/.memorytree/transcripts.",
    82→    )
    83→    parser.add_argument(
    84→        "--raw-upload-permission",
    85→        choices=("not-set", "approved", "denied"),
    86→        default="not-set",
    87→        help="Current repository permission for committing raw transcript files.",
    88→    )
    89→    parser.add_argument("--format", choices=("text", "json"), default="text", help="Output format.")
    90→    return parser.parse_args()
    91→

    96→    return default_global_transcript_root()

   103→        f"session_id: {result['session_id']}",
   104→        f"started_at: {result['started_at']}",
   105→        f"detected_project: {result['detected_project']}",
   106→        f"matches_current_repo: {str(result['matches_current_repo']).lower()}",
   107→        f"raw_upload_permission: {result['raw_upload_permission']}",
   108→        f"message_count: {result['message_count']}",
   109→        f"tool_event_count: {result['tool_event_count']}",
   110→        f"repo_raw_path: {result['repo_raw_path']}",

   375→class ImportTranscriptTests(unittest.TestCase):
   376→    def test_full_import_pipeline(self) -> None:
   377→        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
   378→            root = Path(tmp) / "repo"
   379→            global_root = Path(tmp) / "global"
   380→            root.mkdir()
   381→            global_root.mkdir()
   382→
   383→            source = Path(tmp) / "source.jsonl"
   384→            records = [
   385→                {"type": "user", "sessionId": "sess-1", "cwd": str(root),
   386→                 "message": {"role": "user", "content": "Test message"}},
   387→                {"type": "assistant", "sessionId": "sess-1",
   388→                 "message": {"role": "assistant", "content": "Response"}},
   389→            ]
   390→            source.write_text("\n".join(json.dumps(r) for r in records), encoding="utf-8")
   391→
   392→            parsed = parse_claude_transcript(source)
   393→            result = import_transcript(
   394→                parsed=parsed,
   395→                root=root,
   396→                global_root=global_root,
   397→                project_slug="test-project",
   398→                raw_upload_permission="not-set",
   399→                mirror_to_repo=True,
   400→            )
   401→
   402→            self.assertEqual(result["client"], "claude")
   403→            self.assertEqual(result["project"], "test-project")
   404→            self.assertEqual(result["message_count"], 2)
   405→            self.assertTrue(Path(result["global_raw_path"]).exists())
   406→            self.assertTrue(Path(result["global_clean_path"]).exists())
   407→            self.assertTrue((root / result["repo_raw_path"]).exists())
   408→            self.assertTrue((root / result["repo_clean_path"]).exists())

"""Transcript search index — SQLite upsert for the global transcript catalog."""

from __future__ import annotations

import sqlite3
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any


def upsert_search_index(db_path: Path, manifest: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
    conn = sqlite3.connect(db_path)
    try:
        conn.execute("PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL")
        conn.execute(
            """
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS transcripts (
                client TEXT NOT NULL,
                project TEXT NOT NULL,
                session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                raw_sha256 TEXT NOT NULL,
                title TEXT NOT NULL,
                started_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                imported_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                cwd TEXT NOT NULL,
                branch TEXT NOT NULL,
                raw_source_path TEXT NOT NULL,
                raw_upload_permission TEXT NOT NULL,
                global_raw_path TEXT NOT NULL,
                global_clean_path TEXT NOT NULL,
                repo_raw_path TEXT NOT NULL,
                repo_clean_path TEXT NOT NULL,
                repo_manifest_path TEXT NOT NULL,
                message_count INTEGER NOT NULL,
                tool_event_count INTEGER NOT NULL,
                PRIMARY KEY (client, project, session_id, raw_sha256)
            )
            """
        )
        conn.execute(
            """
            INSERT INTO transcripts (
                client,
                project,
                session_id,
                raw_sha256,
                title,
                started_at,
                imported_at,
                cwd,
                branch,
                raw_source_path,
                raw_upload_permission,
                global_raw_path,
                global_clean_path,
                repo_raw_path,
                repo_clean_path,
                repo_manifest_path,
                message_count,
                tool_event_count
            ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
            ON CONFLICT(client, project, session_id, raw_sha256) DO UPDATE SET
                title = excluded.title,
                started_at = excluded.started_at,
                imported_at = excluded.imported_at,
                cwd = excluded.cwd,
                branch = excluded.branch,
                raw_source_path = excluded.raw_source_path,
                raw_upload_permission = excluded.raw_upload_permission,
                global_raw_path = excluded.global_raw_path,
                global_clean_path = excluded.global_clean_path,
                repo_raw_path = excluded.repo_raw_path,
                repo_clean_path = excluded.repo_clean_path,
                repo_manifest_path = excluded.repo_manifest_path,
                message_count = excluded.message_count,
                tool_event_count = excluded.tool_event_count
            """,
            (
                manifest["client"],
                manifest["project"],
                manifest["session_id"],
                manifest["raw_sha256"],
                manifest["title"],
                manifest["started_at"],
                manifest["imported_at"],
                manifest["cwd"],
                manifest["branch"],
                manifest["raw_source_path"],
                manifest["raw_upload_permission"],
                manifest["global_raw_path"],
                manifest["global_clean_path"],
                manifest["repo_raw_path"],
                manifest["repo_clean_path"],
                manifest["repo_manifest_path"],
                manifest["message_count"],
                manifest["tool_event_count"],
            ),
        )
        conn.commit()
    finally:
        conn.close()

"""Transcript import — orchestration, cleaning, and manifest management."""

from __future__ import annotations

import json
import shutil
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

from _transcript_index import upsert_search_index
from _transcript_parse import (
    ParsedTranscript,
    load_json,
    normalize_timestamp,
    sha256_file,
    slugify,
    timestamp_partition,
    yaml_escape,
)


def import_transcript(
    parsed: ParsedTranscript,
    root: Path,
    global_root: Path,
    project_slug: str,
    raw_upload_permission: str,
    mirror_to_repo: bool = True,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    imported_at = normalize_timestamp(datetime.now(timezone.utc))
    raw_sha256 = sha256_file(parsed.source_path)
    session_label = slugify(parsed.session_id, fallback=slugify(parsed.source_path.stem, fallback="session"))
    artifact_stem = f"{session_label}__{raw_sha256[:8]}"
    source_suffix = parsed.source_path.suffix or ".txt"

    year_token, month_token = timestamp_partition(parsed.started_at or imported_at)

    repo_root = root / "Memory" / "06_transcripts"
    repo_raw_path = repo_root / "raw" / parsed.client / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}{source_suffix}"
    repo_clean_path = repo_root / "clean" / parsed.client / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}.md"
    repo_manifest_path = repo_root / "manifests" / parsed.client / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}.json"

    global_raw_path = global_root / "raw" / parsed.client / project_slug / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}{source_suffix}"
    global_clean_path = global_root / "clean" / parsed.client / project_slug / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}.md"
    global_manifest_path = global_root / "index" / "manifests" / parsed.client / project_slug / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}.json"
    global_event_log_path = global_root / "index" / "sessions.jsonl"
    global_db_path = global_root / "index" / "search.sqlite"

    for path in (
        global_raw_path,
        global_clean_path,
        global_manifest_path,
        global_event_log_path,
        global_db_path,
    ):
        path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    if mirror_to_repo:
        for path in (repo_raw_path, repo_clean_path, repo_manifest_path):
            path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    if mirror_to_repo:
        copy_file(parsed.source_path, repo_raw_path)
    copy_file(parsed.source_path, global_raw_path)

    manifest = {
        "client": parsed.client,
        "project": project_slug,
        "session_id": parsed.session_id,
        "title": parsed.title,
        "started_at": parsed.started_at,
        "imported_at": imported_at,
        "cwd": parsed.cwd,
        "branch": parsed.branch,
        "raw_source_path": parsed.source_path.as_posix(),
        "raw_sha256": raw_sha256,
        "raw_upload_permission": raw_upload_permission,
        "repo_raw_path": repo_raw_path.relative_to(root).as_posix() if mirror_to_repo else "",
        "repo_clean_path": repo_clean_path.relative_to(root).as_posix() if mirror_to_repo else "",
        "repo_manifest_path": repo_manifest_path.relative_to(root).as_posix() if mirror_to_repo else "",
        "global_raw_path": global_raw_path.as_posix(),
        "global_clean_path": global_clean_path.as_posix(),
        "global_manifest_path": global_manifest_path.as_posix(),
        "message_count": len(parsed.messages),
        "tool_event_count": len(parsed.tool_events),
        "cleaning_mode": "deterministic-code",
        "repo_mirror_enabled": mirror_to_repo,
    }
    existing_global_manifest = load_json(global_manifest_path)
    manifest = preserve_existing_import_timestamp(existing_global_manifest, manifest)

    if mirror_to_repo:
        write_clean_markdown(parsed, manifest, repo_clean_path)
    write_clean_markdown(parsed, manifest, global_clean_path)
    if mirror_to_repo:
        write_json(repo_manifest_path, manifest)
    append_to_event_log = existing_global_manifest is None or existing_global_manifest != manifest
    write_json(global_manifest_path, manifest)
    if append_to_event_log:
        append_jsonl(global_event_log_path, manifest)
    upsert_search_index(global_db_path, manifest)

    result = dict(manifest)
    result["global_index_db"] = global_db_path.as_posix()
    return result


def transcript_has_content(parsed: ParsedTranscript) -> bool:
    return bool(parsed.messages or parsed.tool_events)


def write_clean_markdown(parsed: ParsedTranscript, manifest: dict[str, Any], path: Path) -> None:
    lines = [
        "---",
        f"client: {manifest['client']}",
        f"project: {manifest['project']}",
        f"session_id: {manifest['session_id']}",
        f"title: {yaml_escape(manifest['title'])}",
        f"started_at: {manifest['started_at']}",
        f"imported_at: {manifest['imported_at']}",
        f"cwd: {yaml_escape(manifest['cwd'])}",
        f"branch: {yaml_escape(manifest['branch'])}",
        f"raw_source_path: {yaml_escape(manifest['raw_source_path'])}",
        f"raw_sha256: {manifest['raw_sha256']}",
        f"raw_upload_permission: {manifest['raw_upload_permission']}",
        f"cleaning_mode: {manifest['cleaning_mode']}",
        "---",
        "",
        f"# {manifest['title'] or manifest['session_id']}",
        "",
        "## Metadata",
        f"- Client: `{manifest['client']}`",
        f"- Project: `{manifest['project']}`",
        f"- Session ID: `{manifest['session_id']}`",
        f"- Started At: `{manifest['started_at']}`",
        f"- Imported At: `{manifest['imported_at']}`",
        f"- Raw SHA256: `{manifest['raw_sha256']}`",
        f"- Raw Source: `{manifest['raw_source_path']}`",
        f"- Repo Raw Path: `{manifest['repo_raw_path']}`",
        f"- Repo Clean Path: `{manifest['repo_clean_path']}`",
        "",
        "## Messages",
    ]

    if parsed.messages:
        for index, message in enumerate(parsed.messages, start=1):
            lines.extend(
                [
                    f"### {index}. {message.role}",
                    f"- Timestamp: `{message.timestamp or manifest['started_at']}`",
                    "",
                    message.text,
                    "",
                ]
            )
    else:
        lines.extend(
            [
                "No user or assistant messages were extracted deterministically from the source transcript.",
                "",
            ]
        )

    lines.append("## Tool Events")
    if parsed.tool_events:
        for event in parsed.tool_events:
            lines.append(f"- `{event.timestamp or manifest['started_at']}` {event.summary}")
    else:
        lines.append("- No tool events were extracted.")
    lines.append("")

    path.write_text("\n".join(lines), encoding="utf-8")


def preserve_existing_import_timestamp(existing: dict[str, Any] | None, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
    if existing is None:
        return payload
    if manifest_signature(existing) != manifest_signature(payload):
        return payload
    preserved = dict(payload)
    imported_at = existing.get("imported_at")
    if isinstance(imported_at, str) and imported_at:
        preserved["imported_at"] = imported_at
    return preserved


def manifest_signature(payload: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
    return {key: value for key, value in payload.items() if key != "imported_at"}


def manifest_changed(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
    if not path.exists():
        return True
    try:
        current = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    except (OSError, json.JSONDecodeError):
        return True
    return current != payload


def write_json(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
    path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")


def append_jsonl(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
    with path.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
        handle.write(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n")


def copy_file(source: Path, destination: Path) -> None:
    if source.resolve() == destination.resolve():
        return
    shutil.copy2(source, destination)

                [
                    f"### {index}. {message.role}",
                    f"- Timestamp: `{message.timestamp or manifest['started_at']}`",
                    "",
                    message.text,
                    "",
                ]
            )
    else:
        lines.extend(
            [
                "No user or assistant messages were extracted deterministically from the source transcript.",
                "",
            ]
        )

    lines.append("## Tool Events")
    if parsed.tool_events:
        for event in parsed.tool_events:
            lines.append(f"- `{event.timestamp or manifest['started_at']}` {event.summary}")
    else:
        lines.append("- No tool events were extracted.")
    lines.append("")

    path.write_text("\n".join(lines), encoding="utf-8")


def preserve_existing_import_timestamp(existing: dict[str, Any] | None, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
    if existing is None:
        return payload
    if manifest_signature(existing) != manifest_signature(payload):
        return payload
    preserved = dict(payload)
    imported_at = existing.get("imported_at")
    if isinstance(imported_at, str) and imported_at:
        preserved["imported_at"] = imported_at
    return preserved


def manifest_signature(payload: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
    return {key: value for key, value in payload.items() if key != "imported_at"}


def manifest_changed(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
    if not path.exists():
        return True
    try:
        current = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    except (OSError, json.JSONDecodeError):
        return True
    return current != payload


def write_json(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
    path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")


def append_jsonl(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
    with path.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
        handle.write(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n")


def copy_file(source: Path, destination: Path) -> None:
    if source.resolve() == destination.resolve():
        return
    shutil.copy2(source, destination)

"""Transcript parsing — dataclasses, client inference, and format-specific parsers."""

from __future__ import annotations

import json
from dataclasses import dataclass
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

from _transcript_common import *  # noqa: F401,F403
from _transcript_common import (
    TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES,
    TOOL_USE_TYPES,
    TOOL_RESULT_TYPES,
    TranscriptMessage,
    TranscriptToolEvent,
    earliest_timestamp,
    ensure_dict,
    ensure_list,
    extract_gemini_text,
    extract_text_blocks,
    find_first_mapping_with_keys,
    get_nested,
    join_paragraphs,
    load_jsonl,
    normalize_timestamp,
    summarize_value,
)


@dataclass
class TranscriptMessage:
    role: str
    text: str
    timestamp: str | None = None


@dataclass
class TranscriptToolEvent:
    summary: str
    timestamp: str | None = None


@dataclass
class ParsedTranscript:
    client: str
    session_id: str
    title: str
    started_at: str
    cwd: str
    branch: str
    messages: list[TranscriptMessage]
    tool_events: list[TranscriptToolEvent]
    source_path: Path


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Client inference + dispatch
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


def infer_client(client: str, source: Path) -> str:
    if client != "auto":
        return client
    normalized = source.as_posix().lower()
    if "/.codex/" in normalized or "rollout-" in source.name.lower():
        return "codex"
    if "/.claude/" in normalized or "/projects/" in normalized:
        return "claude"
    if "/.gemini/" in normalized or "checkpoint" in normalized:
        return "gemini"
    raise SystemExit(f"could not infer transcript client from source path: {source}")


def parse_transcript(client: str, source: Path) -> ParsedTranscript:
    if client == "codex":
        return parse_codex_transcript(source)
    if client == "claude":
        return parse_claude_transcript(source)
    if client == "gemini":
        return parse_gemini_transcript(source)
    raise SystemExit(f"unsupported transcript client: {client}")


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Codex parser
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


def parse_codex_transcript(path: Path) -> ParsedTranscript:
    records = load_jsonl(path)
    session_id = path.stem
    title = path.stem
    started_at = normalize_timestamp(path.stat().st_mtime)
    cwd = ""
    branch = ""
    messages: list[TranscriptMessage] = []
    tool_events: list[TranscriptToolEvent] = []

    for record in records:
        record_type = str(record.get("type") or "")
        timestamp = normalize_timestamp(record.get("timestamp"), started_at)
        if record_type == "session_meta":
            payload = ensure_dict(record.get("payload"))
            session_id = str(payload.get("id") or session_id)
            title = str(payload.get("thread_name") or payload.get("title") or title)
            started_at = earliest_timestamp(started_at, payload.get("timestamp"))
            cwd = str(payload.get("cwd") or cwd)
            branch = str(get_nested(payload, "git", "branch") or branch)
            continue

        if record_type not in {"response_item", "event_msg"}:
            continue

        payload = ensure_dict(record.get("payload"))
        payload_type = str(payload.get("type") or "")
        if payload_type == "message":
            role = str(payload.get("role") or "").lower()
            if role in {"user", "assistant"}:
                text = extract_text_blocks(payload.get("content"))
                if text:
                    messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))
            continue

        if payload_type in {"user_message", "agent_message"}:
            role = "user" if payload_type == "user_message" else "assistant"
            text = str(payload.get("message") or "").strip()
            if text:
                messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))
            continue

        if payload_type == "function_call":
            name = str(payload.get("name") or "function_call")
            arguments = payload.get("arguments") or payload.get("input")
            tool_events.append(
                TranscriptToolEvent(
                    summary=f"{name} input={summarize_value(arguments)}",
                    timestamp=timestamp,
                )
            )
            continue

        if payload_type == "custom_tool_call":
            name = str(payload.get("name") or payload.get("call_id") or "custom_tool_call")
            tool_events.append(
                TranscriptToolEvent(
                    summary=f"{name} input={summarize_value(payload.get('input'))}",
                    timestamp=timestamp,
                )
            )
            continue

        if payload_type == "function_call_output":
            name = str(payload.get("name") or payload.get("call_id") or "function_call_output")
            output = payload.get("output") or payload.get("content")
            tool_events.append(
                TranscriptToolEvent(
                    summary=f"{name} output={summarize_value(output)}",
                    timestamp=timestamp,
                )
            )
            continue

        if payload_type == "custom_tool_call_output":
            name = str(payload.get("name") or payload.get("call_id") or "custom_tool_call_output")
            output = payload.get("output") or payload.get("content")
            tool_events.append(
                TranscriptToolEvent(
                    summary=f"{name} output={summarize_value(output)}",
                    timestamp=timestamp,
                )
            )

    return ParsedTranscript(
        client="codex",
        session_id=session_id,
        title=title,
        started_at=started_at,
        cwd=cwd,
        branch=branch,
        messages=messages,
        tool_events=tool_events,
        source_path=path,
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Claude parser
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


def parse_claude_transcript(path: Path) -> ParsedTranscript:
    records = load_jsonl(path)
    session_id = path.stem
    title = path.stem
    started_at = normalize_timestamp(path.stat().st_mtime)
    cwd = ""
    branch = ""
    messages: list[TranscriptMessage] = []
    tool_events: list[TranscriptToolEvent] = []

    for record in records:
        record_type = str(record.get("type") or "")
        timestamp = normalize_timestamp(record.get("timestamp"), started_at)
        session_id = str(record.get("sessionId") or session_id)
        started_at = earliest_timestamp(started_at, record.get("timestamp"))
        cwd = str(record.get("cwd") or cwd)
        branch = str(record.get("gitBranch") or branch)

        if record_type not in {"user", "assistant"}:
            continue

        message = ensure_dict(record.get("message"))
        role = str(message.get("role") or record_type).lower()
        text_parts: list[str] = []
        content = message.get("content")
        if isinstance(content, str):
            text = content.strip()
            if role in {"user", "assistant"} and text:
                messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))
            continue

        for block in ensure_list(content):
            if isinstance(block, str):
                if block.strip():
                    text_parts.append(block.strip())
                continue
            if not isinstance(block, dict):
                continue
            block_type = str(block.get("type") or "").lower()
            if block_type in TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES:
                text = str(block.get("text") or "").strip()
                if text:
                    text_parts.append(text)
                continue
            if block_type in SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES:
                continue
            if block_type in TOOL_USE_TYPES:
                name = str(block.get("name") or "tool_use")
                tool_events.append(
                    TranscriptToolEvent(
                        summary=f"{name} input={summarize_value(block.get('input'))}",
                        timestamp=timestamp,
                    )
                )
                continue
            if block_type in TOOL_RESULT_TYPES:
                tool_use_id = str(block.get("tool_use_id") or "tool_result")
                tool_events.append(
                    TranscriptToolEvent(
                        summary=f"{tool_use_id} output={summarize_value(block.get('content'))}",
                        timestamp=timestamp,
                    )
                )

        text = join_paragraphs(text_parts)
        if role in {"user", "assistant"} and text:
            messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))

    return ParsedTranscript(
        client="claude",
        session_id=session_id,
        title=title,
        started_at=started_at,
        cwd=cwd,
        branch=branch,
        messages=messages,
        tool_events=tool_events,
        source_path=path,
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Gemini parser
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


def parse_gemini_transcript(path: Path) -> ParsedTranscript:
    session_id = path.stem
    title = path.stem
    started_at = normalize_timestamp(path.stat().st_mtime)
    cwd = ""
    branch = ""
    messages: list[TranscriptMessage] = []
    tool_events: list[TranscriptToolEvent] = []

    if path.suffix.lower() == ".jsonl":
        payload: Any = load_jsonl(path)
    else:
        payload = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

    message_signatures: set[tuple[str, str, str | None]] = set()
    first_meta = find_first_mapping_with_keys(payload, {"sessionId", "chatId", "cwd", "branch", "timestamp"})
    if first_meta:
        session_id = str(first_meta.get("sessionId") or first_meta.get("chatId") or first_meta.get("id") or session_id)
        started_at = earliest_timestamp(started_at, first_meta.get("timestamp"))
        cwd = str(first_meta.get("cwd") or first_meta.get("projectRoot") or cwd)
        branch = str(first_meta.get("branch") or branch)

    def visit(node: Any) -> None:
        nonlocal session_id, started_at, cwd, branch
        if isinstance(node, list):
            for item in node:
                visit(item)
            return
        if not isinstance(node, dict):
            return

        session_id = str(node.get("sessionId") or node.get("chatId") or node.get("id") or session_id)
        started_at = earliest_timestamp(started_at, node.get("timestamp"))
        cwd = str(node.get("cwd") or node.get("projectRoot") or cwd)
        branch = str(node.get("branch") or branch)

        role = str(node.get("role") or node.get("author") or node.get("sender") or "").lower()
        timestamp = normalize_timestamp(node.get("timestamp"), started_at)
        if role in {"user", "assistant", "model"}:
            normalized_role = "assistant" if role == "model" else role
            text = extract_gemini_text(node)
            signature = (normalized_role, text, timestamp)
            if text and signature not in message_signatures:
                message_signatures.add(signature)
                messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=normalized_role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))

        tool_name = (
            get_nested(node, "toolUse", "name")
            or node.get("toolName")
            or node.get("functionName")
            or node.get("tool")
        )
        if tool_name:
            tool_events.append(
                TranscriptToolEvent(
                    summary=f"{tool_name} input={summarize_value(node.get('args') or node.get('input'))}",
                    timestamp=timestamp,
                )
            )

        for value in node.values():
            visit(value)

    visit(payload)

    return ParsedTranscript(
        client="gemini",
        session_id=session_id,
        title=title,
        started_at=started_at,
        cwd=cwd,
        branch=branch,
        messages=messages,
        tool_events=tool_events,
        source_path=path,
    )
